name: <ModelName>_getParameter
title: <ModelName>_getParameter
syntax: long <ModelName>_getParameter( dword index, float values[], dword nrOfValues);
description: Retrieves the values of a model parameter and copies them into an array. The array size must not be smaller than the number of values the parameter has.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Model parameter. You can find the index of the model parameter in the file <ModelName>_M.csv which is located in the destination directory of the code generation, i.e the target directory of the model DLL.
